headline: GE HealthCare (GEHC) Introduces AI-Driven Upgrade Pathways to Modernize Legacy Imaging Suites
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:GEHC) is one of the top 10 hidden AI stocks to buy. On June 29, GE HealthCare announced new upgrade pathways designed to modernize legacy Innova and Discovery interventional suites with Allia platform technology. These upgrades allow healthcare facilities to integrate advanced imaging innovations and AI-enabled workflows without requiring major construction […]
